title: Mirostan totems
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d47815ec3d46c64485fc3a59f1318d8181fd3451.png)

**ENG**

**Description**
This RP adds a totems of Mirostan players.

**Mods**
1. [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is requried.
2. [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) is recommended.

**Notes**
1. There is a names of totems -> [here](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1O7yqgIUd5-7TdJ8wlbI_WCqb3vyAto3xDISEtJbKP2I/edit?usp=sharing).
2. This RP have a 3 secret totems).

**RU**

**Описание**
Этот Ресурс пак добавляет тотемы игроков Миростана

**Моды**
1. [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) обязателен.
2. [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) рекомендуется.

**Заметки**
1. [Тут](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1O7yqgIUd5-7TdJ8wlbI_WCqb3vyAto3xDISEtJbKP2I/edit?usp=sharing) названия тотемов.
2. Есть 3 секретных тотема
